title: podman rmi <multi-arg>: can leave untagged images
body:
`podman rmi IMG1 IMG2`, where IMG1 == IMG2 except for the tag, seems to be removing the tags but not actually the images themselves:
```
# centos=docker.io/stackbrew/centos
# for tag in 7 latest;do podman pull -q  $centos:$tag;done
61b442687d681ef80a7b1ae148ed5ce75a94d5fcca94315378839b3ad240f314
61b442687d681ef80a7b1ae148ed5ce75a94d5fcca94315378839b3ad240f314
# podman images
REPOSITORY                   TAG      IMAGE ID       CREATED       SIZE
docker.io/stackbrew/centos   latest   61b442687d68   2 years ago   204MB
docker.io/stackbrew/centos   7        61b442687d68   2 years ago   204MB

# podman rmi $centos:7 $centos:latest
Untagged: docker.io/stackbrew/centos:7
Untagged: docker.io/stackbrew/centos:latest
# podman images
REPOSITORY   TAG      IMAGE ID       CREATED       SIZE
<none>       <none>   61b442687d68   2 years ago   204MB
```
Running individual `rmi` commands works fine; the first one untags, the second removes:
```
# for tag in 7 latest;do podman pull -q  $centos:$tag;done
...
# for tag in 7 latest;do podman rmi   $centos:$tag;done
Untagged: docker.io/stackbrew/centos:7
61b442687d681ef80a7b1ae148ed5ce75a94d5fcca94315378839b3ad240f314
```
podman-0.6.3-1528484991.gitb78e7e4.fc28.x86_64 and podman-0.5.4-1527007540.git926d07d.fc27.x86_64
